description: The importance or worth attributed to something; what matters. 'Wone' names what we hold precious—the recognition of significance.
sound_symbolism: The word weighs warmly. 'Wo' wonders with appreciative opening, worth recognized. 'Ne' settles with grounded acknowledgment.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo wone' (the value). As verb: 'mi wone' (I value). Related to 'rolia' (worth) as attributed versus inherent.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Values as compass—what we value shapes what futures we build.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Examining values—investigating what we hold dear and why.
